contract_claim: record_token_usage reads result.usage.get("input_tokens") and result.usage.get("output_tokens"), implying CompletionResult exposes a `usage` mapping attribute.
observed_behavior: The CompletionResult dataclass defines only content, input_tokens, output_tokens, model and stop_reason — there is no `usage` attribute, so lines 18-19 raise AttributeError the first time record_token_usage is called.
